HGSS.568.0000:
I... I’m in shock!\f
A guy about your age with piercing
eyes and long hair came in.\f
He scared me into giving him my
prized Pokémon!\f
I still have one left, but what if
he comes back?\f
You look strong.
Could you look after my Pokémon\r
for a while? [0200,0000]
HGSS.568.0001:
Oh, thank you!
Take good care of it, please!\f
HGSS.568.0004: Oh, no... What’ll I do if he comes back?
HGSS.568.0005:
Hi! How’s my Pokémon?\f
I think I’m safe now, so may I have
it back? [0200,0000]
HGSS.568.0009:
My Pokémon has come to like you.\f
All right, you should keep it.
But promise to be good to it!
HGSS.568.0010:
Oh, no, no...
That’s the same as being robbed.
HGSS.568.0011:
For Pokémon, happiness is being
with a person who treats them well.
HGSS.568.0012:
Huh?
It’s holding an item.\r
You should keep that.
HGSS.568.0013:
Huh?
Its Poké Ball has a Ball Capsule on it!\r
Please remove it.
HGSS.568.0014:
Huh?
You...only have one Pokémon!\r
You can’t give it back to me then.
